title: I want to get the account names associated with the accounts that have installed our marketplace application

posts.author: zabithrg (Zabith Rafeek)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, we are only able to return the account IDs using the following query:

query {
  app_installs (app_id: 10065477) {
    app_id
    timestamp
    app_install_account {
      id
    }
    app_install_user {
      id
    }
    app_version {
      major
      minor
      patch
      type
      text
    }
  }
}

Can someone please advise if there is a way to retrieve the account names as well?
